creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Mon, 7 Jun 1999, Mikhail Teterin wrote:

> This  sort  of response  may  be  good  for  training your  children  or
> servants:  "Please,  get   out,  close  the  door,  and   come  back  in
> as  a  well  behaving  young  gentleman".  I take  this  is  a  hint,  I
> need  FreeBSD  more  then  FreeBSD  needs me  (as  a  porter).  No,  I'm
> not  going  to  resubmit  it  this  way.  As  I  wrote  in  my  PR  (see
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=12059):

> At this point, anyone can get  the uuencoded tarball from the URL above,
> make the diffs and re-submit them. But it will not be me.

As long as you are making the 'children' reference.

This sounds a lot like "fine, I'm taking my toys and leaving. I'm not your
friend anymore."


- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
- ph:(800) 252-2421 - bfumerol@computerhorizons.com - billf@FreeBSD.org  -
